specs.title: Invalid login should show error message
Leaderboard ranking logic should be consistent
Quiz score calculation consistency
Day unlock logic: days should have valid dates
Supabase connection should be valid
Table "profiles" should exist and be accessible
Table "weeks" should exist and be accessible
Table "days" should exist and be accessible
Table "quizzes" should exist and be accessible
Table "scores" should exist and be accessible
Table "attendance" should exist and be accessible
Table "tasks" should exist and be accessible
Table "submissions" should exist and be accessible
Table "announcements" should exist and be accessible
Foreign key consistency: days -> weeks
Foreign key consistency: quizzes -> days
Constraint validation: profiles should have full_name and email
Check for orphan profiles (missing auth.users)
Unauthenticated user should be redirected from /dashboard to login
Unauthenticated user should be redirected from /progress to login
Unauthenticated user should be redirected from /leaderboard to login
Unauthenticated user should be redirected from /profile to login
Public pages should be accessible
